description.unified: Deals a total of ??? M.DMG over 7 attacks to nearby enemies in a circular range of self. Then, attacks frontal enemies in range, dealing ??? M.DMG and knocking them down for [1.5 sec->3 sec].

Unleashes the power of [Arcane Crystals] within to deal ??? M.DMG to all enemies and stun them for [0.5 sec->2 sec]. Upon casting, activates [Arcane Crystal Awakening] for [10 sec->15 sec], which increases ATK Spd of all allies by [15%->300] and releases a shockwave every [1.3 sec->2 sec] to enemies in range of self, dealing ??? M.DMG and stunning them for [(added) 1 sec].

Summons [Arcane Crystals] and deals ??? M.DMG to frontal enemies in a straight line. Shortly afterward, causes an explosion that deals ??? additional M.DMG and inflicts [Arcane Crystal Curse] upon enemies for 5 sec, reducing their ATK Spd by [10%->200]. Attacking enemies under [Arcane Crystal Curse] inflicts a stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy]. [Arcane Crystal Curse] explodes after 5 sec, dealing M.DMG equal to ??? + ??? per stack of [Arcane Crystal] Energy.
Increases own ATK by [150 Mana Recovery per sec -> ???] and Crit Chance by [150->200], while increasing the duration of CCs that all allies inflict to Bosses by [20%->30%].

II.unified: ATK Boost is increased by [50 Crit Chance -> 10%].

III.unified: ATK Boost is increased by [75 Crit Chance -> 15%].

IV.unified: ATK Boost is increased by [125 Crit Chance -> 25%].

dark.unified: When there is 1 enemy, increases DMG by [15% per use -> 100%].

light.unified: Reduces Mana cost by [4 sec duration -> 1].

dark.unified: Increases the caster's DMG to all Non-hero enemies by [Kirze's ATK Spd by 40% -> 20%] while under [Arcane Crystall Awakening].

light.unified: Increases DMG to Non-hero enemies by [65%->25%] for [10 sec->20 sec] at the beginning of each battle.

description.unified: [Slash Blade of Judgment!] Increases DMG by {0}% and reduces Mana Cost by 1.
[Disperse, Crystal Haze!] Increases ATK Spd by an additional {0} and increases DEF Penetration of all allies by [100->250] for the duration of Skill.
[Bloom, Crimson Flower!] Decreases Cooldown by [(added) 30%], and gaining 1 stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy] has a [1 additional stack -> {0}% chance to add 3 additional stacks].
[End to Evil Deeds!] Increases Crit Chance by an additional 250 and the effect of the duration of CC increases chances to {0}%.

dark.unified: Increases Crit DMG by [30%->40%] and DEF Penetration by 150. This effect is boosted by 2 times once Kirze attacks the enemy 100 times.

description.unified: Amplifies the power of Arcane Crystals and greatly increases the effect range of [Bloom, Crimson Flower!]. Normal and Skill attacks have a [8%->4%] chance to deal additional M.DMG equal to {0}% of ATK. DMG is doubled against Bosses.
